{"problem_standardized_math":"Let\n\\[\nf(x)=10(x_2-x_1^2)^2+(1-x_1)^2.\n\\]\nUsing the quadratic model\n\\[\nm_k(p)=f_k+g_k^Tp+\\frac12 p^TB_kp,\n\\]\nand assuming that \\(B_k\\) is the Hessian of \\(f\\), draw the contour lines of this model at \\(x=(0,-1)\\). Then draw the family of solutions of the trust-region subproblem\n\\[\n\\min_{p\\in \\mathbf{R}^n} m_k(p)=f_k+g_k^Tp+\\frac12 p^TB_kp\n\\qquad \\text{subject to } \\|p\\|\\le \\Delta_k,\n\\]\nas the trust-region radius varies from \\(\\Delta=0\\) to \\(\\Delta=2\\). Repeat for \\(x=(0,0.5)\\)."}
